SDK Example
import {{ Agent }} from "compute";

const agent = new Agent({{
  model: "claude-opus-4.7",
  tools: [slack, linear, github],
  memory: "persistent",
}});

const result = await agent.run(
  "Triage the three oldest open issues"
);
